title: Animated Marketing Landing Page with Next.js
description: Build a polished marketing or portfolio landing page — Tailwind styling, shadcn/ui components, Framer Motion animations, a Resend-powered contact form, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Tailwind CSS v4 for utility-first styling
Install shadcn/ui for polished, accessible UI components
Add Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations and page transitions
Wire up a contact form with Resend email delivery
Add error monitoring for production reliability
Deploy to Vercel for CDN-backed global delivery
